tools.name: get_race_state
tools.description: Retrieve the latest unified RaceState snapshot containing car, driver, environment, safety, strategy, and prediction models.

tools.name: compute_driver_coaching
tools.description: Generate turn-by-turn coaching instructions based on the current RaceState.

description.const: Retrieve the latest unified RaceState snapshot containing car, driver, environment, safety, strategy, and prediction models.
Generate turn-by-turn coaching instructions based on the current RaceState.
Compute optimal pit strategy based on tires, fuel, degradation, race context, and predictive models.
Evaluate safety conditions, risk levels, incidents, and compliance based on the current RaceState.
Simulate an alternative race scenario such as pitting now, staying out, tire changes, or safety car conditions.
Generate a structured post-race summary including key moments, strategy evaluation, driver performance, and safety interventions.

scenario.description: A natural-language description of the scenario to simulate. Examples: 'pit now', 'stay out', 'switch to softs', 'safety car in 2 laps'.

race_log.description: A list of TelemetryPoints and race events representing the full race history.

race_state.description: The full RaceState object containing all telemetry, models, and predictions.
